falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score drops below 25 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates reduced pressure/intensity, contradicting the current blowoff score of 37 and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict

falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above 15% above the historical bottom_2022_may_luna pattern's peak level
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaks the 81% similarity threshold by diverging from the historical pattern's price trajectory, disproving the current pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: Major central bank intervention (e.g., Fed rate cut >50bps) occurs within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Introduces a clear external driver contradicting the current HOLD signal and UNKNOWN phase assessment

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
